name: Salim Lakhani
title: CNCF Ambassador & WCAGscanner Co-founder
bio: I am an Ambassador with the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF.io) and a Founding Member of DrupalOps.com (also at Meetup.com/DrupalOps), a community for Drupal DevOps enthusiasts and professionals. As an Ambassador of CNCF, I help manage several DevOps, Kubernetes and Prometheus meetup groups. As a co-founder of WCAGscanner, I am committed to building tools that empower organizations to create inclusive digital experiences. Professionally, I am also the founder of DevPanel, a Control Panel that helps users run their own Dev/Test/Live workflow in their own AWS account.

name: Will Kirchheimer
title: Technical Architect & WCAGscanner Co-founder
bio: I am a Technical Architect with over 20 years of experience in engineering leadership and a long-standing member of the global Drupal community. My professional focus is on the modernization of large-scale federal systems, where I provide architectural oversight to ensure high-performance digital service delivery for millions of users. Throughout my career in the public sector, I have been a dedicated advocate for Section 508 compliance and WCAG standards, integrating accessibility into the core of the development lifecycle. As a co-founder of WCAGscanner, I am committed to building tools that empower organizations to create inclusive digital experiences that are accessible to everyone.
